name: Biscuit Cheese Balls
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Cheddar cheese; cut into 40 cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. Separate the dough into 10 biscuits.
4. Cut each biscuit into 4 quarters.
5. Flatten each piece slightly and place a cheese cube in the center of each.
6. Fold the dough over the cheese, sealing tightly to form a ball.
7. Combine Parmesan cheese, cornflake crumbs, and seasoned salt.
8. Dip each ball in melted margarine, then roll lightly in the cornflake mixture.
9. Drizzle any remaining margarine over the balls.
10. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 7-9 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Serve hot.
NOTE: To make ahead, prepare up to step 8 and refrigerate up to 2 hours before continuing with the recipe.
